{{CargoRelic
|name=M-theory
|class_id=22758
|rank=SSS
|affct=TECH
|birthday=12-09
|source=
|description=On Dec 9, 1995 AD, American physicist Edward Witten introduced the M-theory.<br>The M-theory is a theoretical framework seeking to unify fundamental forces and particles in the universe, aiming to unveil the mysteries of a multi-dimensional cosmos. It builds upon string theory, proposing that all fundamental particles arise from the vibrations of tiny strings. These strings vibrate in higher-dimensional space, while our perceived four-dimensional spacetime is just one facet of this higher-dimensional realm. The theory integrates five superstring theories and eleven-dimensional supergravity, attempting to elucidate the fundamental principles of the universe. While offering a novel perspective on the structure of the cosmos, it still faces challenges in terms of experimental correspondence and integration with existing physics knowledge.
|fame=68
|art=50
|fth=75
|civ=61
|tech=108
|ss1=Snail ATK +30<br>Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +30<br>Per 10 Lucky Coins gained, Snail ATK +6<br>Lucky Coins Gained: 400/400
|ss2=Snail ATK +40<br>Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +40<br>Per 10 Lucky Coins gained, Snail ATK +12<br>Lucky Coins Gained: 400/400
|ss3=Snail ATK +50<br>Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +50<br>Per 10 Lucky Coins gained, Snail ATK +18<br>Lucky Coins Gained: 400/400
|ss4=Snail ATK +70<br>Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +70<br>Per 10 Lucky Coins gained, Snail ATK +30<br>Lucky Coins Gained: 400/400
|ss5=Snail ATK +90<br>Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +90<br>Per 10 Lucky Coins gained, Snail ATK +42<br>Lucky Coins Gained: 400/400
|ss6=Snail ATK +120<br>Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +120<br>Per 10 Lucky Coins gained, Snail ATK +60<br>Lucky Coins Gained: 400/400
|ss7=Snail ATK +120<br>Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +120<br>Per 10 Lucky Coins gained, Snail ATK +60<br>Lucky Coins Gained: 400/400<br>Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +100 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Frostsanctum skill III.png|50px]]Place in Frost Sanctum: This Relic's TECH +15
|skill2=[[File:Frostsanctum skill III.png|50px]]Place in Frost Sanctum: Frost Sanctum, Glorium Cap +30%
|skill3=[[File:Frostsanctum skill III.png|50px]]Place in Frost Sanctum: Frost Sanctum, Glorium Output +30%
|mirage={{Mirage|name=The 11D Universe|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|Drone, +10|orange}}
|3name=fermion|3rec=124.63M|3atk=368468|3defense=219244|3hp=40647139|3weak=45360
|4name=Boson|4rec=143.56M|4atk=410491|4defense=245878|4hp=55133607|4weak=49151
|5name=Graviton|5rec=169.05M|5atk=466845|5defense=281737|5hp=80641697|5weak=53395
|6name=Gravitino|6rec=203.95M|6atk=540725|6defense=330833|6hp=117387611|6weak=58122
|Arec=263.04M|Aatk=643720|Adefense=399211|Ahp=194590073|Aweak=63337
}}}}
